subject: Virtual background does not appear
description: User selects virtual background; video shows only blur or original room.

ts_steps.title: Confirm Apple Silicon Mac
ts_steps.action: Zoom VB supported on current M-series with current Zoom.

ts_steps.title: Lighting
ts_steps.action: Face well lit vs background for segmentation.

ts_steps.title: Green screen option
ts_steps.action: Enable only if physical green screen in use.

ts_steps.title: Custom image rules
ts_steps.action: PNG/JPG small file size; reasonable resolution.

ts_steps.title: Blur-only test
ts_steps.action: If blur works but images fail — asset pipeline.

ts_steps.title: Admin policy
ts_steps.action: IT may disable VB — confirm template.

internal_information: Apple Silicon performance adequate; policy may disable. No Intel CPU requirement text.
